channel.title: gehc — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by gehc (gehc).

item.title: CVE-2024-27110 · 8.4 HIGH — Elevation of privilege vulnerability in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products
item.description: Elevation of privilege vulnerability in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products

item.title: CVE-2024-27109 · 7.6 HIGH — Insufficiently protected credentials in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products
item.description: Insufficiently protected credentials in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products

item.title: CVE-2024-27108 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Non privileged access to critical file vulnerability in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products
item.description: Non privileged access to critical file vulnerability in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products

item.title: CVE-2024-27107 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Weak account password in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products
item.description: Weak account password in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products

item.title: CVE-2024-27106 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Vulnerable data in transit in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products
item.description: Vulnerable data in transit in GE HealthCare EchoPAC products

item.title: CVE-2024-1630 · 7.7 HIGH — Path traversal vulnerability in “getAllFolderContents” function of Common Service Desktop, a GE HealthCare ultrasound device component
item.description: Path traversal vulnerability in “getAllFolderContents” function of Common Service Desktop, a GE HealthCare ultrasound device component

item.title: CVE-2024-1629 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Path traversal vulnerability in “deleteFiles” function of Common Service Desktop, a GE HealthCare ultrasound device component
item.description: Path traversal vulnerability in “deleteFiles” function of Common Service Desktop, a GE HealthCare ultrasound device component

item.title: CVE-2024-1628 · 8.4 HIGH — OS command injection vulnerabilities in GE HealthCare ultrasound devices
item.description: OS command injection vulnerabilities in GE HealthCare ultrasound devices

item.title: CVE-2024-1486 · 7.4 HIGH — Elevation of privileges via misconfigured access control list in GE HealthCare ultrasound devices
item.description: Elevation of privileges via misconfigured access control list in GE HealthCare ultrasound devices
